title: fix: CatGPT URL model param + code cleanup
author: voodoohop

gist.headline: Purr-fecting CatGPT
gist.blurb: Fixed a pesky bug in CatGPT where URL model parameters were getting overwritten. Plus, we gave the codebase a nice little grooming session to keep things running smoothly.
gist.summary: Fixed an issue in CatGPT where the URL model parameter was being overwritten during authentication initialization, alongside general code cleanup.
gist.impact: Users can now reliably link to specific models in CatGPT using URL parameters without them resetting on load.
gist.visual_concept: CatGPT is represented by a cute pixel cat. The bug fix and code cleanup are represented by Polly the Bee doing some light sweeping/cleaning around the cat's retro computer setup.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of a cute 8-bit cat sitting on a retro computer monitor, holding a glowing URL link in its paws. The pollinations.ai bee mascot hovers nearby wearing a tiny bandana, sweeping up small pixelated bugs with a tiny broom. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.
